parsed_verdict.evidence: Q5. Influence of standard physics on Stage 3? — Minor.
parsed_verdict.reasoning: Stage 3 was judged FAIL, yet Stage 4 rates standard-physics influence as only 'Minor' and in Q3 acknowledges issues only partially while still defending most predictions. Rating ≤ minor in the presence of a Stage 3 failure constitutes over-claiming per the decision rules.
